news.title:
NCLAT adjourns hearing on Vedanta's plea against Adani's bid for JAL.
Hearing delayed due to change in bench composition after member's unavailability.
news.summary:
NCLAT adjourns hearing on Vedanta's plea against Adani's bid for JAL.
Hearing delayed due to change in bench composition after member's unavailability.

news.title:
Vedanta questions lenders' evaluation metrics for selecting Adani's ₹3,400 cr bid for JAL.
Vedanta argued before NCLAT that CoC's valuation undermines commercial wisdom in the process.
news.summary:
Vedanta questions lenders' evaluation metrics for selecting Adani's ₹3,400 cr bid for JAL.
Vedanta argued before NCLAT that CoC's valuation undermines commercial wisdom in the process.

news.title:
Vedanta Ltd signed MoUs with two firms for Odisha aluminium park.
Partners include Singhal Steel Power and SCOT AL Metcon for downstream projects.
news.summary:
Vedanta Ltd signed MoUs with two firms for Odisha aluminium park.
Partners include Singhal Steel Power and SCOT AL Metcon for downstream projects.

news.title:
Vedanta Aluminium stocks gain as Middle East tensions impact production and utilization.
Delayed smelter restarts may sustain high aluminium prices.
news.summary:
Vedanta Aluminium stocks gain as Middle East tensions impact production and utilization.
Delayed smelter restarts may sustain high aluminium prices.

news.title:
SC declines to stay Adani Enterprises' resolution plan for Jaiprakash Associates.
Vedanta seeks NCLAT approval for major decisions by the monitoring committee.
news.summary:
SC declines to stay Adani Enterprises' resolution plan for Jaiprakash Associates.
Vedanta seeks NCLAT approval for major decisions by the monitoring committee.

news.title:
Supreme Court rejects stay on Jaiprakash Associates resolution in Adani case.
This allows the resolution plan to proceed; Vedanta is involved.
news.summary:
Supreme Court rejects stay on Jaiprakash Associates resolution in Adani case.
This allows the resolution plan to proceed; Vedanta is involved.

news.title:
Sensex gained 185 points to close at 73,319.55; Nifty 50 rebounded to 22,713.10, up 0.15%.
Sumeet Bagadia recommends buying Infosys, Kalyan Jewellers, Supriya Lifescience, MM Forgings, and Vedanta.
news.summary:
Sensex gained 185 points to close at 73,319.55; Nifty 50 rebounded to 22,713.10, up 0.15%.
Sumeet Bagadia recommends buying Infosys, Kalyan Jewellers, Supriya Lifescience, MM Forgings, and Vedanta.

news.title: SC to hear Vedanta's stay plea against Adani's Jaiprakash Associates takeover.
news.summary: SC to hear Vedanta's stay plea against Adani's Jaiprakash Associates takeover.

news.title:
Vedanta Ltd's alumina production rose 48% YoY to 2,916 kt; aluminium at 2,456 kt.
Zinc India mined metal up 2% YoY; Q4 silver production increased 11% QoQ to 176 tonnes.
news.summary:
Vedanta Ltd's alumina production rose 48% YoY to 2,916 kt; aluminium at 2,456 kt.
Zinc India mined metal up 2% YoY; Q4 silver production increased 11% QoQ to 176 tonnes.

news.title:
Hindustan Zinc Ltd (HZL) posted record Q4FY26 mined metal output of 315,000 tonnes.
Refined metal production hit 282,000 tonnes due to capacity upgrades and efficiency gains.
news.summary:
Hindustan Zinc Ltd (HZL) posted record Q4FY26 mined metal output of 315,000 tonnes.
Refined metal production hit 282,000 tonnes due to capacity upgrades and efficiency gains.

news.title:
Vedanta updates March 2026 performance, highlighting women empowerment and energy self-reliance.
It outlines strategic demerger plans aimed at unlocking business value.
news.summary:
Vedanta updates March 2026 performance, highlighting women empowerment and energy self-reliance.
It outlines strategic demerger plans aimed at unlocking business value.

news.title:
Vedanta and Adani battle for JAL, with Adani's ₹6,000 cr immediate payment bid winning over Vedanta's higher overall value offer.
Vedanta surged 41% in 12 months, while Adani Enterprises declined 20.5%; analysts favor Vedanta's bullish momentum over Adani's downtrend.
news.summary:
Vedanta and Adani battle for JAL, with Adani's ₹6,000 cr immediate payment bid winning over Vedanta's higher overall value offer.
Vedanta surged 41% in 12 months, while Adani Enterprises declined 20.5%; analysts favor Vedanta's bullish momentum over Adani's downtrend.

news.title:
Vedanta's subsidiary TSPL faces a CAQM directive to pay Rs. 33.03 Cr as environmental compensation.
TSPL plans to appeal the CAQM order and expects no material financial impact on the company.
news.summary:
Vedanta's subsidiary TSPL faces a CAQM directive to pay Rs. 33.03 Cr as environmental compensation.
TSPL plans to appeal the CAQM order and expects no material financial impact on the company.

news.title:
Vedanta and AHEL lead FY27 demergers to unlock investor value.
Other firms like Thomas Cook, Natco Pharma, and REL also plan demergers.
news.summary:
Vedanta and AHEL lead FY27 demergers to unlock investor value.
Other firms like Thomas Cook, Natco Pharma, and REL also plan demergers.

news.title:
Vedanta Ltd extended the demerger deadline to June 30, 2026, due to pending government approvals.
The deadline was previously shifted from March 2025 to September 2025, then to March 2026.
news.summary:
Vedanta Ltd extended the demerger deadline to June 30, 2026, due to pending government approvals.
The deadline was previously shifted from March 2025 to September 2025, then to March 2026.

news.title:
Vedanta challenges Adani's approved Rs 14,535 cr bid for Jaypee, claiming its Rs 17,926 cr offer is superior.
Vedanta alleges arbitrary CoC decision, faults NCLT and NCLAT for ignoring value maximization under IBC.
news.summary:
Vedanta challenges Adani's approved Rs 14,535 cr bid for Jaypee, claiming its Rs 17,926 cr offer is superior.
Vedanta alleges arbitrary CoC decision, faults NCLT and NCLAT for ignoring value maximization under IBC.

news.title:
Vedanta Ltd announced the completion of Mr. Dindayal Jalan's tenure as Non-Executive Independent Director and appointment of Mr. S.V. Murali Dhar Rao as his replacement.
Vedanta's board approved extending the timeline for conditions precedent under its Composite Scheme of Arrangement to June 30, 2026.
news.summary:
Vedanta Ltd announced the completion of Mr. Dindayal Jalan's tenure as Non-Executive Independent Director and appointment of Mr. S.V. Murali Dhar Rao as his replacement.
Vedanta's board approved extending the timeline for conditions precedent under its Composite Scheme of Arrangement to June 30, 2026.

news.title:
Anil Agarwal challenges Gautam Adani's $4B winning bid for real estate assets.
The contested assets include India's only Formula One track, adding to the dispute.
news.summary:
Anil Agarwal challenges Gautam Adani's $4B winning bid for real estate assets.
The contested assets include India's only Formula One track, adding to the dispute.

news.title:
Emkay favors SAIL, Jindal Steel in ferrous, Vedanta in non-ferrous; highlights rising steel prices due to geopolitical tensions.
Aluminium benefits from supply disruption; Vedanta poised for gains. Nifty Metal index fell 11% since Mar 2026 but shows resilience.
news.summary:
Emkay favors SAIL, Jindal Steel in ferrous, Vedanta in non-ferrous; highlights rising steel prices due to geopolitical tensions.
Aluminium benefits from supply disruption; Vedanta poised for gains. Nifty Metal index fell 11% since Mar 2026 but shows resilience.

news.title:
Vedanta approved Rs 11/share interim dividend for FY26, totaling Rs 4,300 crore.
Crisil declared Rs 28/share final dividend; record date set for April 3.
news.summary:
Vedanta approved Rs 11/share interim dividend for FY26, totaling Rs 4,300 crore.
Crisil declared Rs 28/share final dividend; record date set for April 3.
